history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a dark-themed game progress screen with a highlighted user profile and level statistics labeled “LEVEL UP!”.

Main Subject:
A rectangular, rounded interface panel displays a user name and level progression information, centered beneath a large “LEVEL UP!” title. On the left side of the panel is a circular profile image with stylized text and an orange-gold scene inside the circle, while the center shows “LEVEL” and “EXPERIENCE” boxes and a horizontal progress bar.

Setting:
The background is dark purple and black with a subtle gradient. The layout resembles an in-game UI screen, with no visible physical environment.

Visual Details:
At the top, “LEVEL UP!” appears in bright gold/yellow with small diamond-like icons on both sides. The main panel is outlined with a faint light border and has rounded corners. The user name “Kayzzz” appears in large white text near the upper left of the panel, with a small badge to its right showing “#6” inside an outlined rounded rectangle. Beneath the profile name is “LEVEL PROGRESS” in smaller uppercase text. Two main stat boxes are displayed horizontally: the left box shows “LEVEL” in light text with a large white “14,” and the right box shows “EXPERIENCE” with “15 / 750” in bright teal/green. Below these is a thick horizontal progress bar in dark gray/black with a small pink vertical indicator on the left; on the far right of the progress row is “2%” in light text. Three smaller dark boxes appear below the bar with labels and numbers: “MESSAGES 1,551,” “XP NEEDED 735,” and “NEXT LVL 15.” At the bottom center, there is faint gray text reading “Congratulations on leveling up!”

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Kayzzz
#6
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
14

15 / 750
2%

1,551

NEXT LVL

Congratulations on leveling up!
“KAYZ MARKET” (visible within the circular profile image)
Huat a (unclear partial text within the circular profile image)

Practical Summary:
The image is a game UI screen showing a player’s level progress and experience stats. It highlights the user “Kayzzz” with level 14, experience 15/750, a 2% progress indicator, and upcoming next-level information.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
